docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINEDA, EUFEMIA AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, MARIA AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
